news.summary: Dublin, The Motorcycle Airbag Market analysis report covers components, coating types, fabric types, channels, regions, sizes, and trends up to 2030. According to ResearchAndMarkets.com, the global market is expected to grow substantially, increasing from US$433.55 million in 2024 to US$795.82 million by 2030. It is projected to have a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.02% from 2025 to 2030. This growth is attributed to a significant rise in road accidents.
news.headline: Global motorcycle airbag market set to grow from US$433.55 million in 2024 to US$795.82 million by 2030, with a 11.02% CAGR.

news.summary: Dan Morehead, Pantera Capital's founder and CEO, announced that the crypto industry may witness a surge in public offerings, with companies such as Circle and Figure planning to go public soon. This shift is attributed to the evolving U.S. regulatory environment from a negative stance to a more positive or neutral one. Morehead highlighted key policy changes like the SEC's rollback of Staff Accounting Bulletin 121 and new OCC guidance allowing banks to engage more directly with blockchain technology. These updates are seen as unlocking previously limited opportunities. Morehead commented that numerous quality companies that could have gone public earlier are now likely to do so. In the upcoming six months, a wave of companies like Circle and Figure are expected to make their public debut.
news.headline: Pantera CEO predicts surge in crypto IPOs as US regulatory environment becomes favorable, with Circle and Figure among companies ready to go public.

news.summary: The Company is excited to share that our Chairman, Edi Truell, has received official approval from Swiss authorities to acquire stakes in Swiss hydro power assets through our subsidiary GIG Services SA, known as "Swiss ASC."
news.headline: Chairman Edi Truell's company, 'SwissASC,' approved to acquire stakes in Swiss hydro power assets by Swiss authorities.

news.summary: Singapore-based AI firm, Genius Group, has resumed accumulating Bitcoin for its corporate treasury after a US Court of Appeals favored the company. The firm increased its BTC Treasury by 40%, purchasing 24.5 BTC for $2.7 million, totaling 85.5 BTC at $8.5 million. CEO Roger Hamilton aims to rebuild shareholder value and achieve the 2025 plan, emphasizing education on AI, Bitcoin, and community. Genius Group's NYSE market cap is $24.34 million, with stock currently at $0.34, down from $0.41. The company follows MicroStrategy's trend in adopting a Bitcoin treasury strategy as the latter holds over 2% of total BTC supply. Some companies, like a Bahrain-based catering firm and luxury watchmaker Top Win, are also entering the Bitcoin accumulation space. It's reported that Metric signals $250K Bitcoin as the 'best case' scenario, with SOL and HYPE poised for gains according to Trade Secrets magazine.
news.headline: Genius Group buys 24.5 BTC ($2.7M), raises Bitcoin Treasury 40% to 85.5 BTC ($8.5M) after US court ruling. Share price: $0.34.

news.summary: A strategic partnership has been established between Tutors International, a prominent provider of tailored private tutoring based in Oxford, England, and InGenius Prep, the primary global company specializing in college admissions counseling. The partnership, announced on May 23, 2025, aims to combine the expertise of the two entities. Tutors International is known for its customized tutoring services, while InGenius Prep is renowned for its college admissions support. This collaboration is set to leverage their strengths, benefiting from the synergy of these top players in their respective fields.
news.headline: Tutors International partners with InGenius Prep for improved college admission consulting. Oxford, England, May 23, 2025.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, Tokyo-headquartered PicoCELA Inc. disclosed the pricing of a best-efforts public offering ("Offering") of 6,100,000 American Depositary Shares ("ADSs") at a yet to be revealed cost. PicoCELA, trading under Nasdaq symbol PLCA, specializes in providing enterprise wireless mesh solutions.
news.headline: PicoCELA Inc. announces pricing of public offering - 6.1M ADSs at undisclosed price.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, Concentric AI has appointed Lane Sullivan as the new Chief Information Security and Strategy Officer. Mr. Sullivan will oversee the company's cybersecurity program and play a key role in shaping its strategy to meet the evolving security requirements of businesses. His responsibilities include upholding Concentric AI's security standards and implementing creative measures to fortify protection for confidential data in the modern digital landscape.
news.headline: Concentric AI appoints Lane Sullivan as Chief Information Security and Strategy Officer to enhance data security governance.

news.summary: In Mobile, Alabama, Peak Claims Group, a prominent independent claims management company, has revealed an important alliance with Canopy Weather, a top-notch provider of hyper-localized weather analytics. This partnership strengthens Peak Claims Group's Peak Triage platform, showcasing their dedication to improved claims processing through data-based strategies. Peak Triage, their unique claims methodology, utilizes live data for quicker and more intelligent decision-making.
news.headline: Peak Claims Group partners with Canopy Weather to enhance Peak Triage Platform, improving claims handling through data-driven decision-making.

news.summary: Sucro Limited, a sugar refiner serving North American markets, released financial results for Q1 2025. They reported revenue of $155.2 million from 176,319 metric tons of sugar deliveries, with a net income of $12.0 million. Adjusted gross profit was $13.8 million with a margin of 8.9%. EBITDA was $22.9 million and adjusted EBITDA was $9.9 million. Sugar deliveries decreased by 3.6% compared to Q1 2024, leading to a 16.0% decrease in revenue. Gross profit and EBITDA also declined by 27.4%. The full article is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Sucro Limited announced Q1 2025 results: $155.2 million revenue, 176,319 metric tons of sugar delivered, $12.0 million net income.

news.summary: Upbound Group, Inc. has launched a new Rent-A-Center franchise store in Harlan, Kentucky at 168 Village Center Rd., Suite 163. The store operates from 10 a.m. to 6 p.m. on weekdays and from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. on Saturdays. Upbound is a technology and data-driven company listed on the NASDAQ under UPBD. They specialize in providing accessible and inclusive financial solutions tailored to the needs of underserved consumers.
news.headline: Rent-A-Center opens new store in Harlan, Kentucky at 168 Village Center Rd; Grand Opening Celebration on May 30.

news.summary: In New York, Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF), a leading company in AI and AR beauty and fashion technology and the creator of the widely-downloaded YouCam app suite with over a billion downloads, has introduced AI Clothes Try-on. This innovative platform utilizes Generative AI technology to provide users with a unique virtual fashion shopping experience. By simply uploading one photo, customers can quickly and effortlessly try on a wide range of outfits, including various fabrics and colors, within seconds. This aims to address styling uncertainties and allow users to explore endless outfit possibilities.
news.headline: Perfect Corp. debuts GenAI Clothes Virtual Try-On for websites, apps, and API. Users can try on outfits with one photo.

news.summary: SureWerx, a prominent global manufacturer of personal protective equipment, revealed the selection of Scott Dowell as the new Chief Executive Officer on May 27, 2025. Dowell's appointment reflects the company’s emphasis on leadership in global operations, strategic vision, and growth strategies. He will take over from Chris Baby, as SureWerx continues to prioritize innovation, digitization, and business performance. Baby, the former CEO, will transition into a new role within the company.
news.headline: SureWerx appoints Scott Dowell as CEO starting May 27, 2025, to drive global operations with a focus on innovation, digitization, and growth, succeeding Chris Baby.

news.summary: Statistics reveal a consistent and noteworthy enhancement in clinical outcomes, with a median increase of 13 months in overall survival and 3 months in progression-free survival for the participants in the treatment group.
news.headline: IMUNON to present unprecedented survival data for IMNN-001 in advanced ovarian cancer at ASCO 2025: 13-month and 3-month median increases in overall and progression-free survival.

news.summary: In Toronto today, Jamieson Wellness Inc. declared plans to redeem 2,527,121 Series A Preference Shares presently owned by DCP Capital Partners, valued at $40.19 per Preference Share, as part of DCP's 2023 investment in the Company's Chinese operations. The Redemption Date is set for approximately on June 4, 2025.
news.headline: Jamieson Wellness Inc. will redeem 2,527,121 Series A Preference Shares held by DCP Capital Partners at $40.19 each by June 4, 2025.

news.summary: In Durham, North Carolina, Wolfspeed, Inc. disclosed the appointment of Dr. David Emerson as their new Executive VP and COO. As a publicly listed company under NYSE with the stock symbol WOLF, Wolfspeed aims to enhance operational efficiency in their various facilities spanning 200 millimeters. Dr. Emerson's role involves streamlining processes to shorten customer lead times and bolster the production of top-notch silicon carbide products for the company's clientele. Dr. Emerson is tasked with leading Wolfspeed's operational strategies moving forward.
news.headline: Dr. David Emerson appointed COO of Wolfspeed, focusing on operational excellence at 200-millimeter facility footprint.

news.summary: Frontline plc is set to present its first quarter results for 2025 on a webcast/conference call scheduled for May 23, 2025, at 15:00 CET. The presentation will cover the company's performance in the first quarter of the year, including key financial figures and strategic developments. Investors and stakeholders are encouraged to tune in to gain insights into the company's performance and future outlook.
news.headline: Frontline plc will present Q1 2025 results on May 23, 2025, at 15:00 CET via webcast/conference call.

news.summary: Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADSK) has disclosed that its executives are scheduled to present at the June 4, 2025 Baird 2025 Global Consumer, Technology & Services Conference. The event will feature live webcasts and replays of the presentations. This announcement was made on May 23, 2025, in San Francisco.
news.headline: Autodesk executives will speak at Baird 2025 Global Consumer, Technology & Services Conference on June 4, 2025.

news.summary: In Oakland, California, on May 22, 2025, PG&E Corporation (NYSE: PCG) announced a second quarter 2025 cash dividend of $0.025 per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record as of June 30, 2025, will receive the dividend on July 15, 2025.
news.headline: PG&E announced Q2 2025 cash dividend of $0.025/share. Payable on July 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 30, 2025.

news.summary: If mirdametinib is granted approval, it will become the inaugural therapy in the European Union authorized for individuals with NF1-PN, including both adults and children.
news.headline: SpringWorks Therapeutics' mirdametinib receives positive CHMP opinion for treating NF1-PN in adults and pediatric patients.

news.summary: The 29th World Gas Conference (WGC2025) was held in Beijing from May 19 to 23, 2025, organized by the International Gas Union (IGU). This significant event brought together top companies and experts in the energy sector. The conference served as a platform for sharing insights and innovations in the gas industry on a global scale, facilitating networking opportunities for the approximately [number] attendees present.
news.headline: WGC2025 in Beijing attracted leading companies and experts in energy sector from May 19-23.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, Ashford Hospitality Trust, Inc. (NYSE: AHT) revealed its plans to sell the 242-room Hilton Houston NASA Clear Lake in Houston, Texas. The company has entered into a definitive agreement to sell the property for $27.0 million. This move signifies a strategic decision by Ashford Trust to divest this particular asset.
news.headline: Ashford Hospitality Trust to sell Hilton Houston NASA Clear Lake for $27.0 million in Houston, Texas.

news.summary: Viewers in the United States, Canada, and the United Kingdom can watch Juve Stabia’s progress in the Serie A playoffs through live streaming at no cost. This initiative aims to enhance the profiles of Brera Holdings and the Club itself.
news.headline: Juve Stabia wins 1st Serie A Playoff Semifinal 2-1 vs. Cremonese. 2nd leg to air live in English via Destination Calcio TV.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, 4Front Ventures Corp. declared that its United States subsidiaries, operating in the cannabis industry, have initiated a voluntary receivership process for liquidation in accordance with U.S. laws. 4Front Ventures Corp. is listed on the CSE as FFNT and on the OTCQB as FFNTF.
news.headline: 4Front Ventures Corp. and its US subsidiaries file for receivership for liquidation under the laws.

news.summary: GCL will be participating in Maxim Group's 2025 Virtual Tech Conference to showcase cutting-edge innovations influencing the future. The event is expected to attract a large audience, including investors, tech enthusiasts, and industry experts. GCL's presentation will focus on the latest developments that are reshaping the technological landscape and setting the stage for tomorrow's advancements. The conference is an important platform for companies like GCL to share their vision and strategies with a wide audience.
news.headline: GCL to present at Maxim Group's 2025 Virtual Tech Investor Conference, showcasing innovations for the future.

news.summary: Verismo Therapeutics, a clinical-stage company specializing in CAR T therapy that focuses on the KIR-CAR platform, has shared more information on its Trials in Progress poster presentation at the 2025 American Society for Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting. The presentation will reveal key insights into the company's ongoing trials. The ASCO Annual Meeting is a significant event for the medical community, with attendance expected to exceed 40,000 oncology professionals from around the world. Verismo Therapeutics aims to showcase its advancements in the field of CAR T therapy at this prestigious gathering.
news.headline: Verismo Therapeutics shares info on poster presentation at ASCO 2025. Key focus on KIR-CAR platform.

news.summary: A recent report highlighted that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, which is the lowest it has been in the past five years. The decrease in the unemployment rate signifies a positive change in the job market, with approximately 300,000 new jobs created in the last quarter. Additionally, the report mentioned that the inflation rate remains stable at 2.5%, indicating a steady economic environment. Experts predict that these figures reflect a growing economy and are optimistic about the future outlook.
news.headline: Safe Shot plans to expand its reach through Yerbae’s extensive retail presence and distribution network post-acquisition.

news.summary: In a recent joint statement, Perimeter Medical Imaging AI, Inc. disclosed their collaboration with Salt under a Development Support Agreement. Perimeter, a medical technology company, is listed in both TSXV as PINK and OTCQX as PYNKF. The agreement aims to further enhance their innovative solutions, marking a significant development for the firm.
news.headline: Perimeter teams up with Intermountain Health to explore using OCT and AI to cut cancer reoperations.

news.summary: In Newton, Mass. on May 23, 2025, GV20 Therapeutics unveiled that Dr. Kristopher Wentzel from the Angeles Clinic and Research Institute is set to share new clinical and translational findings of GV20-0251. GV20, an AI-driven biotherapeutics company, disclosed this information.
news.headline: GV20 Therapeutics to present Phase 1 data on GV20-0251 at ASCO Annual Meeting 2025, by Dr. Wentzel, from Angeles Clinic.

news.summary: Singapore-based Multi Ways Holdings Limited, listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbol MWG, a prominent supplier of heavy construction equipment in Singapore and vicinity, announced on May 23, 2025, receiving a notice from NYSE Regulation on May 16, 2025. The notice highlighted the non-compliance due to the Company's failure to timely submit its 2024 Form 20-F to the SEC. Consequently, Multi Ways is now required to adhere to the regulations outlined in Section 1007 of the NYSE American Company Guide to address the filing deficiency and maintain its listing status.
news.headline: Multi Ways Holdings Limited received a deficiency notification from NYSE on May 16, 2025, for delayed filing of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for 2024, impacting its compliance with NYSE American listing standards.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRNX) revealed plans for their participation in the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference set for June 3-5, 2025 in New York, NY.
news.headline: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: CRNX) will attend Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference in June 2025 in NY.

news.summary: Enefit Green AS, with registry code 11184032 and headquarters located at Lelle 22, 11318 Tallinn, Harju county, Estonia, has scheduled its annual general meeting for shareholders on June 26, 2025, at 16:00 EEST. The meeting will take place at Enefit Green’s head office at Lelle 22, Tallinn.
news.headline: Enefit Green AS to hold AGM on 26 June 2025 at 16:00 at its head office in Tallinn (registry code: 11184032).

news.summary: Investors in the Baltic Horizon Fund are now informed that the Annual General Meeting, initially scheduled for 2 June 2025, has been rescheduled to take place on 9 September 2025. The revised financial calendar can be accessed on the Baltic Horizon Fund website.
news.headline: Baltic Horizon Fund shifts Annual General Meeting to 9 Sep 2025 from 2 June 2025. More info on fund's webpage.

news.summary: Nota AI, a leading on-device AI company based in Seoul, Korea, has experienced significant growth in the past five years with its strategic partnerships with industry giants NVIDIA, Qualcomm, and Samsung Electronics. As a result of these partnerships, the company has been able to accelerate its global expansion efforts. In a validation of its tech-driven business model, Nota AI has seen its revenue increase tenfold within the mentioned period. This impressive growth and success were shared by the company in a recent announcement made on May 23, 2025, indicating the progress and achievements they have made in the AI industry.
news.headline: Nota AI is aiming for KOSDAQ listing, partnered with tech giants, revenue grew tenfold in 5 years.

news.summary: Evaxion A/S (NASDAQ: EVAX), a leading clinical-stage TechBio company focusing on AI-Immunology™ powered vaccines, is set to release its first quarter 2025 financial report on May 27, 2025. The update will be provided before the Nasdaq CM opens, with the company offering insights into its recent business performance.
news.headline: Evaxion (NASDAQ: EVAX) to unveil business update and Q1 2025 financial results on May 27, 2025 in Copenhagen.

news.summary: Today in Plano, Texas, on May 23, 2025, Alkami Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALKT), a key player in cloud-based digital banking solutions for U.S. financial institutions, revealed that its executive team is set to participate in the 45th Annual William Blair conference. The company's involvement underscores its commitment to industry engagement and networking.
news.headline: Alkami Technology to present at William Blair 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference, a top US digital banking provider.
